descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: This "Eye of Eternity" inflicts 1 turn of {Petrify} on all enemies. If the target has Petrification Resistance, Final DMG +200%.] Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies and apply [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|turn|turns} of {Vulnerable}. Each Release increases the Base DMG of {Eye of Eternity} by 50%.
